name: SugarDash Phase 0 - Inventory + Reorganize
objective: Move all 222 files from src/Grid/ into proper subnamespaces WITHOUT behavior changes. Update all internal use statements. Fix TD-1 through TD-8 inline.
exit_criteria: All 222 files moved to correct subnamespaces under src/Foundation/, src/Layout/, src/Components/, src/Plot/, src/Module/, src/Registry/, src/Plugin/, src/Modules/, src/Events/, src/Keys/, src/Position/, src/Output/, src/State/
All internal use statements updated (Grid\Foo → Components\Foo or Layout\Foo or Foundation\Foo etc.)
Boxer.php renamed to Pad.php with all references updated
Examples run with updated use lines
README.md table updated with new namespace structure
TD-1 through TD-8 technical debt fixed inline during moves

notes.sequencing: File moves (01-05) MUST be sequential - they all touch shared autoload and use blocks. Docs updates (06-08) and validation (09) can run after all moves complete.
notes.boxer_rename: Boxer.php rename to Pad.php is highest risk - grep first, then replace_all per file.
notes.td_fixes: TD-1 readonly constructor-promoted + clone-mutate, TD-2 dual-state collections, TD-5 str_pad ANSI byte-counts, TD-6 inline secondary classes breaking PSR-4. Fix inline during moves.
